creator: freebsd@igalic.co
text:
dhclient hasn't received any imports from upstream in a long time
(possibly since being capsicumized)
that explains the discrepancy between FreeBSD's dhclient and that on Linux.

please note that there are plans to (eventually) replace dhclient with dhcpcd https://reviews.freebsd.org/D22012

but in the mean time, we might wanna fix this, as it seems easy enough to do
